rows.title: Pore-Balance Facial Sauna Scrub
rows.description:
Splash, swipe + glow with this peach-perfect duo. Peach Glaze 2% Niacinamide Cleanser instantly brightens + tightens pores** for 100% luminosity, while bestselling Pout Preserve Peptide Lip Treatment smooths + hydrates for fuller-looking lips in 1 week.*

*In an 8-week clinical study on 39 people
**In a 1-week clinical study on 33 people

How to Use: Peach Glaze 2% Niacinamide Cleanser :

- Wet your hands and work into a lather.

- Massage over skin in upward, circular motions and rinse.

- Pat dry and follow with Peach Glaze Glow Niacinamide Serum for an extra bright and juicy, glazed glow.

For external use only. Use as directed. 

Peach Glaze Pout Preserve Peptide Lip Treatment :

- Swipe onto lips for an instant boost of hydration that lasts.

- Glow Tip: Use after lip color for added shine!

Ingredients and Safety: - 
Peach Juice Brightens + provides a boost of antioxidant-rich hydration

- 
2% Niacinamide Brightens + reduce the appearance of pores

- 
Scandinavian Cloudberry Fruit Juice Delivers a boost of antioxidant-rich hydration

- 
Enhanced vitamin C brightens and defends against pollution

- 
Lip-Specific Peptides 

- Help makes lips look more defined and fuller

- 
Kokum and Mango Seed Butter 

- Natural moisturizers that are rich in saturated fats; soothe, nourish and condition lips

- 
Cloudberry Oil 

- Rich in antioxidants, vitamins and omega fatty acids; provides intense moisture and helps soften lips

- 
Açai Sterols 

- Rich in antioxidants; help strengthen the skin barrier and boost hydration

rows.title: Double Rewind 0.3% Pro-Grade Retinol Serum
rows.description:
Rewind wrinkles and replay youthful-looking skin. 
This professional-grade retinol serum balances two potent retinoids (pure encapsulated vitamin A and provitamin
A) with soothing aloe vera and a nourishing Scandinavian botanical complex to completely transform your skin.

Created for new and experienced retinol users, the dual-action formula gently resurfaces the outer most layer of
your skin to even skin tone, smooth texture and diminish the look of fine lines, wrinkles and dark spots, while
keeping skin hydrated and restoring skin’s clarity and youthful glow.

*In a 12-week clinical study on 40 people.
rows.ingredients_raw_preview:
0.3% Pure Encapsulated Retinol 

- Pure vitamin A encapsulated in vegan vitamin E and cellulose for defense against free radicals; delivers visible wrinkle-fighting results.

Provitamin A (beta-carotene) 

- A larger vitamin A derivative that pairs well with traditional retinol for optimal results.

20% Aloe Juice 

- Hydrates and refreshes skin.

Scandinavian Rowanberry Extract 

- Moisturizes and nourishes skin.

Birch Sap 

- Calms and soothes skin

Full Ingredient List: Aqua/Water/Eau, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Sorbus Aucuparia Fruit Extract, Betula Alba Leaf Juice, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Oleyl Lactate, Propanediol, Crambe Abyssinica Seed Oil, Retinol, Beta-Carotene, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Xanthophylls, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Lactobacillus Ferment, Propyl Gallate, Cellulose, Biosaccharide Gum-1, Cetearyl Alcohol, C14-22 Alcohols, Cetyl Palmitate, Sodium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Sorbitan Palmitate, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Maltodextrin, C12-20 Alkyl Glucoside, Sorbitan Oleate, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Polyacry

rows.title: Dewtopia 20% Acid Night Treatment
rows.description:
Put uneven texture, dark spots, fine lines and wrinkles to bed. 
This 20% acid smoothing serum does the work while you sleep. Packed with a powerful 20% acid blend (10% AHAs and 10% PHAs), this nightly retexturizing serum overhauls skin texture to reveal a significantly smoother, renewed, brighter complexion. And, it helps replenish skin with aloe juice, birch sap and cotton water.
